name: SRHI Inc.
description: SRHI Inc. is a publicly-listed company headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, primarily focused on the mining and agriculture sectors. Its core business operation is a 70% equity interest in Minera Tres Valles SpA, which operates a copper mine located in Salamanca, Chile. The company is dedicated to growing copper production from this primary asset while pursuing further exploration opportunities. Through its corporate and operational segments, SRHI Inc. manages its investments to drive value within the natural resources industry, leveraging its strategic stake in the Chilean mining project to support its long-term growth objectives.
